topic: ACL main Results page-5 MDL semantics boundary polish

before_text_matches: page 5 line 311: The static evidence is diagnostic. It points
page 5 line 312: to selected mechanisms, not broad rates or
page 5 line 313: proof that MDL semantics stay intact.
defect.reader_effect: The wording was bounded but conversational; proof and stay intact were less precise than the paper's evidence-gate framing.

changes.summary: Rewrote the Material Effects boundary sentence to state that the rows mark cues, not rates or full MDL semantics.

rejected_iterations.summary: The first rewrite introduced visible page-5 linebreak hyphenation identi- and seman-.
The second rewrite introduced visible page-5 linebreak hyphenation mech- and cer-.
The third rewrite introduced visible page-5 linebreak hyphenation esti- and se-.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 5 shows the accepted two-line boundary sentence without body-text linebreak hyphenation.
after_evidence.full_scan_result: The strict after scan reports only reference-column hyphenation on pages 9-10.
after_evidence.visual_result: The page-5 Material Effects paragraph, Figure 3, and caption remain visually stable.

claim_boundary: Results prose only. No metrics, table values, figures, evidence pools, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: Reference pages retain normal reference-column hyphenation.
